suites.name: ai_rout_bootstrap
suites.description: Verifies the AI-only non-elite rout system starts up while leaving elite units and player-controlled units under manual control.

required.value: Legendary Leaders: [RULE] AI non-elite rout enabled at 25% health; elite units hold and human-controlled units keep manual control

suites.name: ai_rout_lane
suites.description: Verifies that an AI non-elite unit breaks, falls back toward its return point, and reaches its rout destination.

suites.name: elite_support_blocks_rout
suites.description: Verifies that rout was blocked because elite support stayed nearby while under pressure.

suites.name: elite_retreat_lane
suites.description: Verifies that elite escort logic creates plans and retreats when the explorer falls.

required.value: Legendary Leaders: created explorer escort plan
Legendary Leaders: all elite units were ordered to retreat after the explorer fell.
required.description: elite retreat triggered after explorer death

required.value: Legendary Leaders: queued explorer ransom through the town center command after losing the leader.

ordered.value: Legendary Leaders: created explorer escort plan
Legendary Leaders: all elite units were ordered to retreat after the explorer fell.
Legendary Leaders: queued explorer ransom through the town center command after losing the leader.
